CustomField.description: Categorizes outstanding balances into aging buckets: Current (0-30 days), 31-60 Days, 61-90 Days, or 90+ Days. Blank if no balance due.
CustomField.formula: IF( BalanceDue__c <= 0, "", IF( ISBLANK(ServiceRenderedDate__c), "No Service Date", IF( DaysOutstanding__c <= 30, "Current (0-30 Days)", IF( DaysOutstanding__c <= 60, "31-60 Days", IF( DaysOutstanding__c <= 90, "61-90 Days", "90+ Days" ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: AR Aging Bucket
